title: Jiu Cang Miao Wo Season 2.5

synonyms: Jiu Cang Miao Wo Di-2.5 Ji
ネコのクラちゃん ～Ordinary days～
Jiu Cang Miao Wo: Richang Pian

synopsis:
On the continent of Aden, there are three evil forces that specifically bully cats. To protect the cats, the Cat Goddess summons three warriors and bestows upon them magical artifacts to fight against the evil forces. This story records all sorts of events, big and small, in their lives.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)
